display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After the owner of a construction company is found dead, Charlie and Rex track the killer to an underground casino. Major Crimes goes undercover to solve the case.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. A terrorist traps Eliot and the mayor in a lift, threatening to send them to their death. Carrie must race against time to save them.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Jack is on the case when a zoo owner is killed by a tranquilliser dart in an empty park - with the only possible culprits in the staff area when the shot was fired.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: com: Yannick Bisson stars in the mystery set in 19th century Toronto. The discovery of a decomposed body leads Murdoch to the fascinating world of telegraphy.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson is the detective pioneer solving mysteries in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch's probing of a death leads to Toronto's Jewish ghetto.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a girl on an island and discovers the victim was an orphan who had been conducting inquiries into her father's murder.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After the owner of a construction company is found dead, Charlie and Rex track the killer to an underground casino. Major Crimes goes undercover to solve the case.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When a troubled soul from the past returns, the priest must investigate the new chapter of the Church of Apollo.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. A terrorist traps Eliot and the mayor in a lift, threatening to send them to their death. Carrie must race against time to save them.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Jack is on the case when a zoo owner is killed by a tranquilliser dart in an empty park - with the only possible culprits in the staff area when the shot was fired.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A man confesses to murdering his boss despite being unable to remember what happened, but Neville is convinced that things are not as simple as they seem.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest has his work cut out thanks to Sid, who is released from prison, but then accused of murdering his former defence barrister in a ghastly manner.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When a troubled soul from the past returns, the priest must investigate the new chapter of the Church of Apollo.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Jack is on the case when a zoo owner is killed by a tranquilliser dart in an empty park - with the only possible culprits in the staff area when the shot was fired.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After the owner of a construction company is found dead, Charlie and Rex track the killer to an underground casino. Major Crimes goes undercover to solve the case.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. The disappearance of a boy sets Murdoch on the trail of spies and a robotic super weapon.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The Victorian mystery series about a Canadian forensics pioneer. In a fever, Murdoch begins to suspect that his landlady may have a murder on her mind.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: 38 Murdoch Special: While investigating a fire in a pawnshop, Murdoch discovers the dead proprietor and believes a stolen shipment of opium might have led to the murder.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Part One: Murdoch's past comes back to haunt him when the body of a woman found in a drum of lye turns out to be a former lover who was fleeing a crime syndicate.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Part Two: Murdoch quickly realises that the boy who tried to avenge Anna's murder is his son. Ogden is stunned but eager to accept the boy out of love for Murdoch.

programme.title: Miss Scarlet
programme.desc: When a new Detective Inspector starts at Scotland Yard, Eliza must fight to prove herself all over again.

programme.title: Miss Scarlet
programme.desc: Eliza is tasked with solving the murder of a high-profile private detective with a closet full of skeletons.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A man confesses to murdering his boss despite being unable to remember what happened, but Neville is convinced that things are not as simple as they seem.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Period drama series. When an old foe tells him that she has arranged the death of her former lover, Father Brown finds himself blamed for the murder.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Period drama series with the sleuthing cleric. Past and present collide when Father Brown investigates the macabre world of dollhouse crime scenes.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Period drama series with the sleuthing cleric. When Mrs McCarthy's goddaughter goes missing, Father Brown follows her trail to a risque gentlemen's club.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Drama series with the curious cleric. When Mrs McCarthy takes over the running of the mobile library, Father Brown discovers a shocking secret.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A man confesses to murdering his boss despite being unable to remember what happened, but Neville is convinced that things are not as simple as they seem.

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: Arch and Fitz investigate Fitz's enemy, Premier O'Brien, when he becomes the prime suspect in a bachelor party gone wrong.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A podcaster's murder before TruthCon leads the team into the murky world of conspiracy theorists, including Mark's former commander with PTSD who bonds with Rex.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest has his work cut out thanks to Sid, who is released from prison, but then accused of murdering his former defence barrister in a ghastly manner.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A plantation owner ends up dead during a seance - although with the door firmly closed at the time and all the participants holding hands round the table, who did the deed.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When popular radio quiz Up To You comes to Kembleford, the sleuthing padre suspects that one of the cast are responsible for their landlady's murder.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team values more rarities at the Britannia Royal Naval College in Dartmouth, Devon, including the personal effects of a Nobel Peace Prize winner.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Victoria Hall in Saltaire, West Yorkshire, where items up for valuation include a doodle by LS Lowry.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A beautiful looking sports car has been fooling the punters and intriguing Derek. It's a Challenger E-Type - a fibreglass replica created from an E-Type mould.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul and Jack head to Staffordshire to pick up five vehicles from collector Rob's colossal barn, including a Mini and a Morris Minor.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The definitive guide to World War II, narrated by the late, great Laurence Olivier. Hear how German U-boats caused havoc among Allied merchant shipping in the Atlantic.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Built in 1934, Ordensburg Vogelsang, a virtual Nazi Castle was constructed with the intention of building the New German; elite future leaders of the Reich.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team values more rarities at the Britannia Royal Naval College in Dartmouth, Devon, including the personal effects of a Nobel Peace Prize winner.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie navigates the Oxford Canal, bumps into a hire boat and a hedge and tackles large river locks on the scenic Upper River Thames.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming journeys from Shardlow to Etruria Junction, Stoke on Trent, exploring the Trent and Mersey Canal.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming explores the English canal network. A low canal tunnel in Staffordshire proves to be problematic and Robbie helps out a stranded boater.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming continues across the Pennines from Marple to Huddersfield, where his journey is hampered by a fallen tree and a leaking lock pound.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming concludes his journey by travelling from Barton Swing Aqueduct to Liverpool Docks - but experiences engine problems on the way.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A beautiful looking sports car has been fooling the punters and intriguing Derek. It's a Challenger E-Type - a fibreglass replica created from an E-Type mould.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul and Jack head to Staffordshire to pick up five vehicles from collector Rob's colossal barn, including a Mini and a Morris Minor.

programme.title: Classic Car Garage
programme.desc: The garage sees a Nissan Figaro with sticking seatbelts which Colin has an unexpected remedy for.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit a Yorkshire textile mill, where Simon repurposes a mill trolley into a coffee table and Henry struggles to repair a Soviet-era motorbike.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of Australia
programme.desc: Actor Martin Clunes explores Lord Howe Island, Norfolk Island and Restoration Island.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of Australia
programme.desc: The actor explores Mundoo Island, which has provided a way of life for five generations of one farming family, and also investigates Phillip Island.

programme.title: Man and Beast with Martin Clunes
programme.desc: Comedy actor Martin Clunes travels to Nepal, where he meets a farmer whose cows not only provide milk, but also the fuel for lighting and cooking in his home.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the abandoned branch line between Holborn and Aldwych. And at Holloway Road they find out about the Tube's only spiral escalator.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway visit North End under Hampstead Heath. Abandoned before completion, the station became a Cold War bunker.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the disused parts of Piccadilly Circus, and visit the long-abandoned Highgate surface station.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the hidden parts of Euston, including unique features not found elsewhere and the bits set for demolition for HS2.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus look to make some quick cash as they fix and wrap a Toyota MR2 MK2. It's quick and it's cheap, but it's the lowest spec out there and it looks dowdy.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus take on a Citroen BX with no brakes, bad paintwork and a rodent infestation - and they've got five days to fix it and flog it.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie struggles with grounding out, a tangled prop and constant challenges on the Rochdale Canal - known as the 'Everest of Canals' - to reach its highest point.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie takes a detour to investigate a local UFO legend in Todmorden, and the UK's deepest canal lock springs a leak, causing trouble for the Naughty Lass.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: While exploring the Wey and Godalming Navigations, Robbie gets caught in a storm and falls off his narrowboat. He also uncovers rock history in Guildford.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels around the coastline of the Indian Ocean, setting out from South Africa - where he dives with sharks - and moving on to Mozambique and Zanzibar.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon's journey takes him spearfishing in Madagascar, through the slums of Mauritius and on to the Seychelles, where he visits the world's smallest national park.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The adventurer travels from the south of Kenya to the Horn of Africa, along the way joining a Ugandan peace-keeping force in Mogadishu, the capital of war-torn Somalia.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads off to Colchester to pick up a 1960 Aston Martin DB4 that has been sitting under a tarpaulin in a garage that has collapsed round it for 40 years.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave is 'lost in France' en route to picking up a rare Honda NSX. Derek heads to a toy factory where some vintage motorbikes are stashed.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: The Royal Highland Fusilier, a 100-ton Deltic diesel engine, must be hauled from Leicestershire to Wirksworth in Cheshire.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: As a teenager, all Dave wanted for his first car was a 2 litre Ghia Cortina, and today he's off to Nottinghamshire to collect just that, alongside a Mark 1 Capri.

programme.title: Stumble
programme.desc: Courteney must cut one of her Buttons from making mat at Daytona. Each of the team shares why Daytona is so important, but Courteney operates with her head over her heart. S1 E12

programme.title: Gladiators UK
programme.desc: In the first of the semi-finals, four determined Contenders face the mighty Gladiators before taking on the gruelling Eliminator as they battle for a place in the grand final.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: The Hundred With Andy Lee
programme.desc: Host Andy Lee is joined in the studio by a panel of Australia's funniest comedians and a 100 regular Aussies via Zoom to explore the fun behind the facts that make us tick.

programme.title: The Voice Australia
programme.desc: On the first night of the battle rounds, 16 contestants sing their hearts out to secure their spot in the competition.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie, an adventurous youngster who happens to be visually impaired, sets out with her best doggy friend Triggs to discover the music and adventure in the sounds of the world around them.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Mischief In Sherwood
programme.desc: Sherwood is in danger from the tyrannical Prince John! Teenage Robin and his merry band of outlaws fight back.

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: Ninjago Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When two evil brothers manipulate the past and future to control all of Ninjago, the ninjas must retrieve the lost time blades to stop them.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Four beybladers and their genius friend travel the world as team 'Bladebreakers' to win a championship, realising there's much more at stake on the go.

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark
programme.desc: After the end of the Transformers' war, the Malto family moves to Witwicky, Pennsylvania, to start a new life but their lives soon get entangled with a group of Terran Transformers.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran gets the lead role in an off-Broadway production of 'Romeo and Juliet'. S2 E7

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: We're inside the MMA gym in Fresh Outta Water, while Fijian-Niuean artist Vitinia shares why she’s Young, Gifted & Brown. Plus, a fashion capsule drop and D for Diaspora makes a Kiki Fulufukamoa.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Cody keeps his distance.

programme.title: School Spirits
programme.desc: Hoping to recount her last living moments, Maddie and her fellow spirits hold an anti-séance which brings to light a shocking new theory. S1 E7

programme.title: Destination X UK
programme.desc: Series Premiere: Rob Brydon takes 13 strangers on the adventure of a lifetime - but can they figure out where in the world they are? S1 E1

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: When Colette tries to fix up her run-down car to get it re-registered, Gregg encourages her to buy a new one to save money. Meanwhile, Barb tries to teach everyone DMV robbery protocols. S1 E19

programme.title: Little
programme.desc: American fantasy comedy. A woman is transformed into her younger self at a point in her life when the pressures of adulthood become too much to bear. Starring Regina Hall. (2019)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: What a breakthrough for Sheldon - he's discovered a machine that will help him understand human emotions. S10 E14

programme.title: A Knight's Tale
programme.desc: William Thatcher, a knight's peasant apprentice, gets a chance at glory when the knight dies suddenly mid-tournament. Posing as a knight himself, William won't stop until he's crowned tournament champion—assuming matters of the heart don't get in the way.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle Of The Five Armies
programme.desc: Bilbo, a hobbit, makes desperate attempts to save Thorin from the clutches of acquisitiveness while Sauron plans an elaborate attack on Middle Earth. Stars Martin Freeman. (2014)

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Amy Gledhill wrings out a poached egg in the penultimate episode of the series.

programme.title: American Princess
programme.desc: Amanda arranges for Brett to help Delilah, while David tries to figure out what he really wants. Maggie’s frustration with the Festival's changes makes her reconsider some old dreams. S1 E8

programme.title: Fight Night: The Million Dollar Heist
programme.desc: Season Finale: Detective Hudson and Chicken man come face to face with the mastermind behind the robbery. S1 E8

programme.title: Vampire Academy
programme.desc: Victor hides his shameful secret, as he and Tatiana go head to head in the Trials. S1 E8

programme.title: Fallen
programme.desc: Miss Miriam reveals some secrets of Sword & Cross; Luce faces her own struggles, fearing she'll die if they stay together; Luce has a vision of Penn's death and tries to prevent her from leaving. S1E7

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: We're inside the MMA gym in Fresh Outta Water, while Fijian-Niuean artist Vitinia shares why she’s Young, Gifted & Brown. Plus, a fashion capsule drop and D for Diaspora makes a Kiki Fulufukamoa.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: This New Zealand-made animation sees the Tākaro Tribe on a learning adventure in Te Wao Arapū (the magical Alphabet Forest), along with Pāpā Rākau (Tree father) and Kōkā (Pond Mother).

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Meet Bluey, an inexhaustible six-year-old Blue Heeler dog who loves to play. She turns everyday family life into extraordinary adventures!

programme.title: Night Eyes
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of four film crews in their investigations of the various paranormal events that occur in their local area and their mission to help the locals deal with their ghostly problems.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Marinette and Adrien look like regular teenagers, usually. But together they are Ladybug and Cat Noir, the heroes that protect Paris from the evil Hawk Moth!

programme.title: Animaniacs
programme.desc: They're back! The Warner brothers, Yakko and Wakko, and the Warner sister Dot — three inseparable, irascible siblings — have a great time wreaking havoc and mayhem in the lives of everyone they me

programme.title: Island of Mystery
programme.desc: Josh and his dog crash back 700 years in time, to a mysterious land where taniwhas roam and ancient warriors rule.

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: They're young, passionate and all putting in the hard yards to become NZ's best young riders. Follow the group of friends and their horses throughout the competition season.

programme.title: What Now?
programme.desc: Come and join the party! Catch Aashma, Imy, Manu and Rahil for gunge, cream pies, challenges, prizes and adventures across Aotearoa! Haere mai ki te whare o te hūwareware!

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran must woo a big investor after her mother and some friends back Maxwell's new play. S2 E8

programme.title: The Voice U.S.A
programme.desc: The remaining artists compete to make it to the live finale; tough decisions are made when coaches Michael Bublé and Reba McEntire can only advance one artist each.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Richie gets it wrong. Cash struggles with Eden's decision. Crime escalates in Summer Bay.

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: Agnes goes on a diet after her family comments about her weight, but soon realises how difficult it will be to lay off the fish and chips.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond The Lobby
programme.desc: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti work at high altitude, 3000 metres above sea-level at a hidden gem of a hotel with Buddhist connections in the remote kingdom of Bhutan.

programme.title: 800 Words
programme.desc: George struggles against the tide of Terry-mania sweeping Weld. The town prepares to open its first fine dining restaurant, but not everyone is invited. S2 E14

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Fishing and Adventure
programme.desc: The boys head to the Far North of New Zealand where their challenge is set to land their personal best snapper and crayfish. The boys have their hands full with some inshore monsters.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: The search for high quality low alcohol Pinot Noir by a Central Otago grower and contractor; Research into managing avian botulism outbreaks; and Benefits of self-shedding sheep for pastoral farmers.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: In Safe Hands: A Southland woman shares stories of mental resilience and farm safety through workshops and children’s books, inspired by the couple’s life on their sheep and beef station.

programme.title: Dog Squad Puppy School
programme.desc: Police pup Tahi hits the beach in Gisborne, find out how the Biosecurity ‘O’ Litter are stepping up? And meet eco warrior Marty who’s training to detect Kauri dieback. S4 E9

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Find My Country House Canada
programme.desc: Couples looking to relocate from the city find their perfect country house in a regional, Canadian location.

programme.title: John & Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John and Lisa delight us with a festive season table menu that includes a chicken vol au vent that the whole family will want and a festive chocolate Black Forest cake.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Australia
programme.desc: Rick Stein explores the Central Coast on Sydney's northern fringes, meeting chefs, foragers and producers, who reveal how the outdoors shapes their approach to food.

programme.title: Make It At Market
programme.desc: Jaycee from West Sussex and Tristan from Perthshire both hope to turn their love for crafts into successful businesses. They are given eight weeks to make enough money to follow their dreams.

programme.title: The Travelling Auctioneers
programme.desc: Research, restore and ready for sale! An intrepid team of antiques experts and master crafters help families turn unwanted items into winning lots.

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: This time on Highway Cops: a truckie’s seatbelt and safe driving save his neck when a tyre blows, and a cellphone spotting exercise uncovers far too many drivers typing and swiping.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Quiz show hosted by Adil Ray in which three pairs of contestants use their powers of deduction to work out words that appear in the Lingo grids and Puzzlewords.

programme.title: Hard Quiz
programme.desc: Battle of the Duds! Tom Gleeson offers a second chance at the Big Brass Mug to fans of rock band Goo Goo Dolls, cricketer Virat Kohli, online game World of Warcraft and more.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent
programme.desc: The auditions reach their conclusion as the last assortment of acts take to the stage in Blackpool, and the performers hope to get one step closer to the prize of 250,000 pounds.

programme.title: Lotto
programme.desc: Takashi Sorimachi stars as Satoru Tachibana, an advertising firm employee slaving away under a younger boss for a meager salary. With a pachinko habit, no savings, and no prospects of romance since his divorce, Tachibana is left wondering what the future holds for him. One day, he desperately enters a lottery, trying to make enough money to pay for his child support, but his sense of self-disgust

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: Sheffield fish and chip shop owner Rani tries to fake it as a high-end sushi chef.

programme.title: The Walsh Sisters
programme.desc: The Walsh family rally around to support Anna in the hospital. S1 E2

programme.title: Moving Houses
programme.desc: Farmers Andy and Genevieve welcome son Michael home from Australia, but his XXL ‘not-so-tiny’ house must navigate Raglan divvy, Bulli Point, and the unpredictable Desert Road to reach the farm.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matty and Olympia navigate a new trust dynamic with Julian as he accompanies Matty to surveil the ex-wife of a Wellbrexa exec. S2 E10

programme.title: Critical Incident
programme.desc: As Zil awaits the outcome of the investigation, Sandra joins a new task force, putting her on a collision course with Dalia. S1 E4

programme.title: The Au Pair
programme.desc: Zoe embarks on a search for answers, but the more she uncovers, the more uncertain everything becomes; Sandrine reaches out with a desperate plea, while George guards secrets of his own. S1 E3

programme.title: Chateau DIY at Christmas
programme.desc: Donna and Paul have one large restoration project to complete before hosting a festive party. Chris and Jolyon go the extra mile to make their Christmas celebrations perfect.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: The search for high quality low alcohol Pinot Noir by a Central Otago grower and contractor; Research into managing avian botulism outbreaks; and Benefits of self-shedding sheep for pastoral farmers.

programme.title: Barkley Manor
programme.desc: Black Russian Zoya’s kitchen raids take a deadly turn, Oscar the Labradoodle’s Sydney OE goes awry, and will Nina the abandoned Rottweiler find her forever home? S1 E7

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Songs Of Praise
programme.desc: Inspiring hymns and songs, together with uplifting stories of faith from around the UK and beyond.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: In Dorset, Susan explores the Jurassic Coast and digs in the footsteps of renowned fossil hunter Mary Anning before moving into Devon and fulfilling her dream of driving a vintage tram.

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programme.title: Waka Huia
programme.desc: Waka Huia is an iconic archival documentary series recording the unique stories and histories of Maori for all New Zealanders.

programme.title: Marae
programme.desc: Your way in to the Māori world and the issues that matter. Māiatanga, Whanaungatanga, Manaakitanga - We bring you stories with heart.

programme.title: Kirstie & Phil: Bleeps, Bloops And Best Bits
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil share their favourite moments from their 25 years together, from outrageous stories to borderline scandalous revelations, with some bleeps and bloopers thrown in for good measure.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Ecuador v Curaçao
programme.desc: Join us for live coverage of the Group E match between Ecuador and Curaçao from Arrowhead Stadium in Kansas City, Kansas.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The adventurer travels from the south of Kenya to the Horn of Africa, along the way joining a Ugandan peace-keeping force in Mogadishu, the capital of war-torn Somalia.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon journeys from Oman to the Maldives, where the tropical coral islands are being damaged by bleaching and an entire island has been manufactured as a landfill dump.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels around the coastline of the Indian Ocean, setting out from South Africa - where he dives with sharks - and moving on to Mozambique and Zanzibar.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon's journey takes him spearfishing in Madagascar, through the slums of Mauritius and on to the Seychelles, where he visits the world's smallest national park.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The adventurer travels from the south of Kenya to the Horn of Africa, along the way joining a Ugandan peace-keeping force in Mogadishu, the capital of war-torn Somalia.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon journeys from Oman to the Maldives, where the tropical coral islands are being damaged by bleaching and an entire island has been manufactured as a landfill dump.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Jonathon Morris stars as sensitive soul Adrian in Carla Lane's sitcom. Lilo Lil confronts the family when Dad decides to come home. Nellie says goodbye to her new man friend.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Cheeky Liverpool comedy and some shocking 1980s hairstyles in Carla Lane's sitcom about a family of loveable rogues. It's the day of Aveline and Oswald's wedding.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Adrian accidentally becomes a hero, Billy is troubled by his impending divorce, Aveline is preoccupied with pregnancy, and Joey is in real trouble.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's sitcom about a family of loveable Liverpudlian rogues. Billy's divorce, Aveline's desire to get pregnant and Joey's tax troubles are overshadowed by Jack's return home.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More Liverpudlian japes in Carla Lane's family sitcom. Adrian's in love, Jack's back buying and selling, and Aveline's all-out efforts to become pregnant continue.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's 1980s sitcom revolving around a family of loveable Liverpudlian rogues. The recovery of a stolen piano causes repercussions in the Boswell house.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Jonathon Morris stars as sensitive soul Adrian in Carla Lane's sitcom. Lilo Lil confronts the family when Dad decides to come home. Nellie says goodbye to her new man friend.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Cheeky Liverpool comedy and some shocking 1980s hairstyles in Carla Lane's sitcom about a family of loveable rogues. It's the day of Aveline and Oswald's wedding.

programme.desc: Adrian accidentally becomes a hero, Billy is troubled by his impending divorce, Aveline is preoccupied with pregnancy, and Joey is in real trouble.

programme.desc: More Liverpudlian japes in Carla Lane's family sitcom. Adrian's in love, Jack's back buying and selling, and Aveline's all-out efforts to become pregnant continue.

programme.desc: Cheeky Liverpool comedy and some shocking 1980s hairstyles in Carla Lane's sitcom about a family of loveable rogues. It's the day of Aveline and Oswald's wedding.

programme.desc: More Liverpudlian japes in Carla Lane's family sitcom. Adrian's in love, Jack's back buying and selling, and Aveline's all-out efforts to become pregnant continue.

programme.desc: Carla Lane's 1980s sitcom revolving around a family of loveable Liverpudlian rogues. The recovery of a stolen piano causes repercussions in the Boswell house.

programme.desc: Jonathon Morris stars as sensitive soul Adrian in Carla Lane's sitcom. Lilo Lil confronts the family when Dad decides to come home. Nellie says goodbye to her new man friend.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Cheeky Liverpool comedy and some shocking 1980s hairstyles in Carla Lane's sitcom about a family of loveable rogues. It's the day of Aveline and Oswald's wedding.

programme.title: Villages By The Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson uncovers the secrets of Cornwall's Tintagel, famed as the legendary birthplace of King Arthur.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An exploration of Chateau Aubery on the island of Martinique, where a criminal kingpin wiped out the opposition.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Castel Volturno in Campana in Italy, Colorado and HMP Shepton Mallet in Somerset.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Camp Hero in Long Island, and a salt mine in Poland.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring the Apollo Movie Theatre in Tbilisi, Georgia, an ornate shrine to Soviet propaganda.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An exploration of Chateau Aubery on the island of Martinique, where a criminal kingpin wiped out the opposition.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Castel Volturno in Campana in Italy, Colorado and HMP Shepton Mallet in Somerset.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Camp Hero in Long Island, and a salt mine in Poland.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring the Apollo Movie Theatre in Tbilisi, Georgia, an ornate shrine to Soviet propaganda.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Laddish comedy series from the creators of Porridge. After hurting his foot, Bob visits the hospital - where Terry now works as a porter.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Sitcom sequel that surpasses the original. Bob takes time away from Thelma to join Terry on a fishing trip. He's racked by guilt, but is not the guilty one.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Comedy gold from Dick Clement and Ian La Frenais, the writers of Porridge and Auf Wiedersehen, Pet. Thelma has gone back to her mother, leaving Bob to bemoan his fate.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Rodney Bewes and James Bolam are the original men behaving badly. Thelma is still at home with her mother, so it's up to Terry to soothe Bob's furrowed brow.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: 1970s sitcom sequel with James Bolam and Rodney Bewes as two mismatched mates. Bob becomes more and more depressed by Thelma's absence and Terry's housekeeping.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Laddish comedy series from the creators of Porridge. After hurting his foot, Bob visits the hospital - where Terry now works as a porter.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Sitcom sequel that surpasses the original. Bob takes time away from Thelma to join Terry on a fishing trip. He's racked by guilt, but is not the guilty one.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Comedy gold from Dick Clement and Ian La Frenais, the writers of Porridge and Auf Wiedersehen, Pet. Thelma has gone back to her mother, leaving Bob to bemoan his fate.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Rodney Bewes and James Bolam are the original men behaving badly. Thelma is still at home with her mother, so it's up to Terry to soothe Bob's furrowed brow.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: 1970s sitcom sequel with James Bolam and Rodney Bewes as two mismatched mates. Bob becomes more and more depressed by Thelma's absence and Terry's housekeeping.
